scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,api,render,redis "pnpm --filter @vessel/web dev" "pnpm --filter @vessel/api dev" "pnpm --filter @vessel/render-view dev" "sh -c 'if command -v redis-server >/dev/null 2>&1; then if ss -ltn | grep -q ":6379"; then echo redis-already-running-on-6379; tail -f /dev/null; else redis-server --port 6379; fi; else echo redis-server-not-found; tail -f /dev/null; fi'"
